movie.actors: Sinbad, Phil Hartman, Kim Greist, Kim Murphy
movie.plot: Kevin Franklin is a con man whose mouth is bigger than him, but it doesn't help him much when he's in with the mob for $50,000. Trying to avoid a gambling addict boss, and his two stupid henchmen, Kevin poses as a childhood friend to Gary Young, a workaholic father whose own life is in turmoil in an affluent Pennsylvania suburb.
movie.title: Houseguest
movie.writer: Michael J. Di Gaetano, Lawrence Gay
